user.title: Connect to EverShelf
user.description: Enter the URL of your EverShelf instance and, optionally, an access token.

data_description.url: Base URL of your EverShelf server, e.g. http://192.168.1.100
data_description.token: Bearer token if your EverShelf instance is protected by SETTINGS_TOKEN

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to EverShelf. Check the URL and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Connection refused: invalid or missing access token.

abort.already_configured: This EverShelf instance is already configured.

add_to_shopping.name: Add to Shopping List
add_to_shopping.description: Add a product to the EverShelf shopping list.

name.name: Product name
name.description: Name of the product to add.

unit.name: Unit
unit.description: Unit of measurement, e.g. pz, kg, l (optional).

mark_used.name: Mark as Used
mark_used.description: Reduce the stock of an inventory item.

name.name: Product name
name.description: Name of the item to reduce (case-insensitive).

quantity.name: Quantity used
quantity.description: Amount to subtract from current stock.

refresh.name: Refresh Data
refresh.description: Force an immediate refresh of EverShelf sensor data.
